productDisplayName: Lotto Women's Juicy Blue Flip Flop
description: Colour your life with a splash in these Juicy floaters from lotto.  Soft and cushy, these slippers relax your tired feet and bring back the spring in your gait.Upper Foam thong straps for lightweight durability Lightly padded thong straps for snug Fit Elastane fabric toe separator for comfort Midsole Soft, cushy footbed for soft feel and maximum comfort Fruity printed footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole in waffle pattern for excellent grip and traction on all surfaces shoe careDo not machine washRub with wet cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
